'''dadutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickwall|hickwall]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickwall|hickwall]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dadutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæditith|dæditith]] || [[word:dæditij|dæditij]] || [[word:dæditish|dæditish]] || [[word:dæditi|dæditi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadudututh|dadudututh]] || [[word:dadudutuj|dadudutuj]] || [[word:dadudutush|dadudutush]] || [[word:dadudutu|dadudutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadututh|dadututh]] || [[word:dadutuj|dadutuj]] || [[word:dadutush|dadutush]] || [[word:dadutu|dadutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:daduftuth|daduftuth]] || [[word:daduftuj|daduftuj]] || [[word:daduftush|daduftush]] || [[word:daduftuf|daduftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadututhu|dadututhu]] || [[word:dadutuju|dadutuju]] || [[word:dadutushu|dadutushu]] || [[word:dadutuku|dadutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadututh|dadututh]] || [[word:dadutuj|dadutuj]] || [[word:dadutush|dadutush]] || [[word:dadutu|dadutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadututhul|dadututhul]] || [[word:dadutujul|dadutujul]] || [[word:dadutushul|dadutushul]] || [[word:dadutukul|dadutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadututhuthu|dadututhuthu]] || [[word:dadutujuju|dadutujuju]] || [[word:dadutushushu|dadutushushu]] || [[word:dadutuku|dadutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadututhun|dadututhun]] || [[word:dadutujun|dadutujun]] || [[word:dadutushun|dadutushun]] || [[word:dadutukun|dadutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadututhuoro|dadututhuoro]] || [[word:dadutujuoro|dadutujuoro]] || [[word:dadutushuoro|dadutushuoro]] || [[word:dadutukuoro|dadutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
